name: Bainbridge High School Lower Gym
description: Bainbridge High School Lower Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bainbridge Island, WA. There are 10 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Battle Point Park
description: Battle Point Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bainbridge Island, WA. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.
